login.signInSubtext: Ngiyajabula ukuthi ubuyile. Ake siqhubeke sifunda futhi sikhule ndawonye.
login.ogeraDescription: I-Ogera iyipulatifomu yemisebenzi yabafundi e-Afrika ehlanganisa abafundi abanentshisekelo namathuba ashintshashintshayo nokukhokha ngemali eselula.
login.ogeraDedicated: I-Ogera izimisele ukuxazulula izinselelo abafundi ababhekana nazo.
login.enter2FACode: Faka ikhodi enezinhlamvu eziyisi-6 evela ku-Google Authenticator ukuze uqedele ukungena.
login.twoFASessionExpired: Iseshini ye-2FA isiphelile. Sicela ungene futhi.

register.connectTrustedEmployers: Xhumana nabaqashi abathembekile, thola imali ngokushesha ngezinkokhelo zeselula, futhi ugcine ukuhle kwakho kwezemfundo – konke kupulatifomu eyodwa eklanyelwe abafundi base-Afrika.
register.testimonial: Ngithole u-$500 enyangeni edlule ngenkathi ngigcina i-GPA yami engu-3.8! Ukulandelela kwezemfundo kwe-Ogera kungigcine ngigxile.
register.registrationSuccess: Ukubhalisa kuphumelele! Sicela uhlole i-imeyili yakho ukuze uqinisekise i-akhawunti yakho.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtext: Faka i-imeyili yakho ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa. Sizothumela ikhodi enezinhlamvu ezi-4 ku-imeyili yakho.

profile.twoFactorOptional: Ngokuzikhethela. Ingeza ukuphepha okwengeziwe usebenzisa i-Google Authenticator.

profile.enterSixDigitCode: Sicela ufake ikhodi enezinhlamvu eziyisi-6 evela kuhlelo lwakho lokuqinisekisa

profile.fileTooLarge: Usayizi wefayela mkhulu kakhulu. Sicela ulayishe ifayela elincane kune-2MB.
profile.profileUpdatedVerifyEmail: Iphrofayili ibuyekezwe! Sicela uhlole i-imeyili yakho ukuze uqinisekise ikheli lakho le-imeyili elisha.

trustScoreDescription.Limited: Intuthuko yokuqinisekisa elinganiselwe. Qedela ukuqinisekisa okuningi ukuze uthuthukise isilinganiso sokuthembana nokufinyelela.
trustScoreDescription.Emerging: Isigaba sokuqala. Qedela ukuqinisekwa kwe-imeyili, ucingo nwezemfundo ukuze uvule ukufinyelela okuphelele.
trustScoreDescription.Developing: Kubonisa amandla nokuqinisekisa okuthile okuqediwe. Kudinga ukuqinisekisa okwengeziwe ukufinyelela okuphelele.
trustScoreDescription.Competent: Isimo esihle nokuqinisekisa okuningi okuqediwe. Unokufinyelela kuzici eziyinhloko zepulatifomu.
trustScoreDescription.Exceptional: Iqinisekisiwe ngokuphelele futhi isesimweni esihle. Unokufinyelela okuphelele kuzo zonke izici zepulatifomu.
